creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 189414
patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates cad/openvsp to the latest release 3.15.0

From the announcement:

Features:

    Stand-alone curve intersection generation, visualization, and export
    VSPAERO GUI integration of PQR unsteady stability stuff

Bug Fixes:

    Structures data organization to make Parms available to API
    View adjust bugs

Q/A:
 - portlint -AC: OK
 - poudriere builds for {10.3,10.4,11.1}{amd64,i386}: OK
 - Build logs available (for some time) at: https://www.dropbox.com/sh/ibupdhrwjwd2sx0/AABY6_iQcNV2upiNSP-2S9wGa?dl=0
